sources.title: 道德真經註
sources.citation_zh: 王弼：《道德真經註》，《四庫全書》本影像，中國哲學書電子化計劃。
sources.citation_en: Wang Bi, Commentary on the Daodejing (Dao de zhen jing zhu), Siku quanshu facsimile, Chinese Text Project.

sources.title: 莊子集釋·齊物論（郭象注）
sources.citation_zh: 郭象注、成玄英疏，郭慶藩輯：《莊子集釋》卷一下〈齊物論〉，中國哲學書電子化計劃。
sources.citation_en: Guo Xiang, commentary in Guo Qingfan, ed., Collected Explanations of the Zhuangzi, juan 1b, “Discussion on Making All Things Equal,” Chinese Text Project.

sources.title: 列子注·天瑞（引何晏《道論》佚文）
sources.citation_zh: 張湛注：《列子》卷一〈天瑞〉，引何晏《道論》佚文，《四庫全書》本影像，中國哲學書電子化計劃。
sources.citation_en: Zhang Zhan, Commentary on the Liezi, juan 1, “Heaven's Gifts,” quoting a lost fragment of He Yan's Discourse on the Way, Siku quanshu facsimile, Chinese Text Project.

sources.title: 嵇中散集·聲無哀樂論
sources.citation_zh: 嵇康：《嵇中散集》卷五〈聲無哀樂論〉，《四庫全書》本影像，中國哲學書電子化計劃。
sources.citation_en: Ji Kang, “Discourse on Sound Being Without Sorrow or Joy,” Collected Works of Ji Zhongsan, juan 5, Siku quanshu facsimile, Chinese Text Project.

sources.title: 肇論·不真空論
sources.citation_zh: 僧肇：《肇論》卷一〈不真空論〉，《大正新脩大藏經》第45冊第1858號，CBETA 電子佛典集成。
sources.citation_en: Sengzhao, Zhao Lun, juan 1, “Treatise on the Emptiness of the Unreal,” Taishō shinshū daizōkyō 45, no. 1858, CBETA.

sources.title: 法華經疏
sources.citation_zh: 竺道生撰：《法華經疏》卷一，《卍新纂大日本續藏經》第27冊第577號，CBETA 電子佛典集成。
sources.citation_en: Attributed to Zhu Daosheng, Commentary on the Lotus Sutra, juan 1, Manji Shinsan Dainihon Zokuzōkyō 27, no. 577, CBETA.

sources.title: 摩訶止觀
sources.citation_zh: 智顗說、灌頂記：《摩訶止觀》卷五，《大正新脩大藏經》第46冊第1911號，CBETA 電子佛典集成。
sources.citation_en: Zhiyi (lectures), recorded by Guanding, Mohe zhiguan, juan 5, Taishō shinshū daizōkyō 46, no. 1911, CBETA.

sources.title: 華嚴金師子章
sources.citation_zh: 法藏述：《華嚴金師子章》，《大正新脩大藏經》第45冊第1881號，CBETA 電子佛典集成。
sources.citation_en: Fazang, Treatise on the Golden Lion of Huayan, Taishō shinshū daizōkyō 45, no. 1881, CBETA.

sources.title: 六祖大師法寶壇經
sources.citation_zh: 宗寶編：《六祖大師法寶壇經》卷一，《大正新脩大藏經》第48冊第2008號，CBETA 電子佛典集成。
sources.citation_en: Zongbao, comp., Dharma-Treasure Platform Sutra of the Sixth Patriarch, juan 1, Taishō shinshū daizōkyō 48, no. 2008, CBETA.

sources.title: 禪源諸詮集都序
sources.citation_zh: 宗密：《禪源諸詮集都序》卷一，《大正新脩大藏經》第48冊第2015號，CBETA 電子佛典集成。
sources.citation_en: Guifeng Zongmi, General Preface to the Collected Expressions of the Source of Chan, juan 1, Taishō shinshū daizōkyō 48, no. 2015, CBETA.

claims.text_zh: 一切“有”之所以能够成立，依恃的是“无”；一切具体事务之所以能够成就，也以无形无名的道为根据。
claims.text_en: Whatever counts as being depends on nonbeing for its arising, and every determinate undertaking is accomplished through the formless and nameless Way.
claims.explanation_zh: 何晏把“无”规定为万有得以发生和成事的根本，而不是把道理解成某个与万物并列的实体。这是正始玄学“贵无”论的核心命题之一。
claims.explanation_en: He Yan treats nonbeing as the ground through which beings arise and affairs are accomplished, rather than as one entity alongside others. This is a central thesis of the Zhengshi xuanxue prioritization of nonbeing.
claims.locator: 《列子》卷一〈天瑞〉张湛注引何晏《道论》
claims.excerpt_text: 有之為有，恃無以生；事而為事，由無以成。
claims.attribution_note: 《道論》原书已佚；此句经西晋张湛《列子注》引录而保存。因此可作为早期传承明确归于何晏的残篇命题，但不应假装拥有完整篇章语境。

claims.text_zh: 万物以“有”的形态生成和存在，但“有”的发生以无形无名的“无”为根本；要保全具体存在，必须返回其无形的根基。
claims.text_en: The myriad things arise and exist as beings, yet being is rooted in formless and nameless nonbeing; to preserve determinate beings one must return to that formless ground.
claims.explanation_zh: 王弼并非说虚无在时间上制造万物，而是以“无”说明一切规定性能够展开的共同根据；“有”与具体功用由此获得秩序。
claims.explanation_en: Wang Bi does not posit a temporal nothing that manufactures things. Nonbeing names the common ground that lets determinate beings and their functions unfold in an ordered way.
claims.locator: 《道德真經註》第四十章“反者道之動”章注
claims.excerpt_text: 天下之物，皆以有為生。有之所始，以無為本。將欲全有，必反於無也。
claims.attribution_note: 采用通行王弼《老子注》文本；命题是对该章注文的规范化概括，而非把《老子》经文直接改署王弼。

claims.text_zh: 声音本身具有可辨的和谐、强弱与节奏，却不内含哀乐；听者的既有情感被声音触发，并不等于哀乐客观地存在于声音之中。
claims.text_en: Sound itself has discernible harmony, force, and rhythm but contains no sorrow or joy; that sound releases emotions already present in a listener does not make those emotions properties of sound.
claims.explanation_zh: 嵇康区分声音的自然属性与听者的情感反应，以此反驳音乐必然表征固定道德情绪或政治盛衰的传统看法。
claims.explanation_en: Ji Kang distinguishes the natural properties of sound from the listener's affective response, challenging the view that music necessarily encodes fixed emotions or the moral condition of a polity.
claims.locator: 《嵇中散集》卷五〈聲無哀樂論〉，东野主人答秦客“声音有自然之和”段
claims.excerpt_text: 音聲有自然之和，而無係於人情……躁靜者，聲之功也；哀樂者，情之主也。
claims.attribution_note: 《声无哀乐论》为嵇康现存论著；规范命题综合文中同一论证段的两句，并未把对话中秦客的反方意见误归给嵇康。

claims.text_zh: 万物并无一个在其背后主宰生成的造物者；每一物都在自身条件中自生、自化，并以其所受之性分各自成立。
claims.text_en: No creator stands behind the generation of things; each thing arises and transforms of itself within its own conditions and is established according to its particular allotment.
claims.explanation_zh: 郭象的“独化”不是说事物彼此绝缘，而是否认一个外在第一因或主宰者；万物共同构成相互因任的秩序，却没有超越秩序的制造者。
claims.explanation_en: Guo Xiang's “lone transformation” does not isolate things from one another. It denies an external first cause or ruler: things form a mutually accommodating order without a transcendent maker.
claims.locator: 《莊子集釋》卷一下〈齊物論〉“怒者其誰邪”句郭象注
claims.excerpt_text: 故物各自生而無所出焉，此天道也。
claims.attribution_note: 以现存郭象整理本《庄子注》为归属单位。史籍记载郭象曾利用向秀旧注，因此本命题可稳妥归于“郭象本注的现存形态”，不主张其措辞必为郭象独创。

claims.text_zh: 缘起之物并非实有，因为它没有独立自性；但它也不是断灭的虚无，因为现象依缘显现。因此真空必须同时超越“实有”和“绝无”。
claims.text_en: Dependently arisen things are not truly existent because they lack independent self-nature, yet neither are they sheer nothingness because phenomena appear through conditions; true emptiness therefore exceeds both reified being and annihilating nonbeing.
claims.explanation_zh: 僧肇用“非有非无”排除把空理解为一个虚无实体，也排除把经验现象当作自性实有，从而把般若空义落在缘起事物的当下。
claims.explanation_en: Sengzhao's “neither being nor nonbeing” rejects both a nihilistic reification of emptiness and a substantialist reading of phenomena, locating emptiness in dependently arisen things themselves.
claims.locator: T45, no. 1858, p. 152a-b，〈不真空論〉“万物果有其所以不有”段
claims.excerpt_text: 然則萬物果有其所以不有，有其所以不無。有其所以不有，故雖有而非有；有其所以不無，故雖無而非無。
claims.attribution_note: 依《大正藏》所收《肇论》通行文本归于僧肇；命题严格保留“非有非无”的双重限定，避免误写成单纯虚无主义。

claims.text_zh: 三乘最终归于一佛乘，因此一切众生都具有成佛并入涅槃的可能；被烦恼覆蔽并不取消其觉悟之分。
claims.text_en: Because the three vehicles ultimately converge in the single Buddha vehicle, every sentient being can become a Buddha and enter nirvāṇa; obscuration by afflictions does not cancel this capacity for awakening.
claims.explanation_zh: 道生从《法华经》的一乘义推出普遍成佛可能性。这为他后来著名的“一阐提亦可成佛”立场提供了现存文本根据，但现存引文没有逐字写出“一阐提”。
claims.explanation_en: Daosheng infers universal Buddhahood from the Lotus Sutra's one vehicle. This surviving text supports the reasoning behind his famous inclusion of icchantikas, although the quoted passage does not itself name icchantikas.
claims.locator: X27, no. 577, 卷1，〈見寶塔品第十一〉（CBETA PDF 印本第26页）
claims.excerpt_text: 既云三乘是一，一切眾生莫不是佛，亦皆泥洹。
claims.attribution_note: 《法华经疏》现本题竺道生撰，文本经后世藏本传承。道生多部相关论著已佚；这里只发布现存疏文能直接支持的“普遍成佛可能”，不把后世传记中的阐提故事伪装成作者原句。

claims.text_zh: 一念心具足十法界，十界互具并各含十如是与三世间，故三千世间不在心外，也不是由心在时间上制造，而与一念不纵不横地相即。
claims.text_en: A single thought contains the ten dharma realms, each mutually containing the others together with the ten suchnesses and three worlds; the three thousand worlds are therefore neither outside mind nor temporally produced by it, but nonsequentially co-present with one thought.
claims.explanation_zh: “一念三千”把凡圣、主体与世界的全部差别纳入当下一念，同时拒绝把心与万法排成先后或容器与内容的关系。
claims.explanation_en: The doctrine of “three thousand in one thought” gathers all distinctions of ordinary and sacred, subject and world, into the present thought while rejecting temporal or container-like relations between mind and phenomena.
claims.locator: T46, no. 1911, p. 54a5-10，卷5〈正修止觀·觀不思議境〉
claims.excerpt_text: 夫一心具十法界，一法界又具十法界百法界；一界具三十種世間，百法界即具三千種世間。此三千在一念心。
claims.attribution_note: 《摩诃止观》是智顗讲说、弟子灌顶记录整理的讲本，故归属应表述为“智顗说、灌顶记”，不当作智顗亲笔定稿。

claims.text_zh: 如金狮子的狮子相依金料、工匠等缘而起，任何具体法都没有独立自性；空性并不妨碍缘起之相显现，缘起之相也不离其真实体性。
claims.text_en: Just as the lion-form arises through gold, artisan, and other conditions, no concrete phenomenon has independent self-nature; emptiness does not obstruct conditioned appearance, and conditioned appearance does not depart from its true nature.
claims.explanation_zh: 法藏以金与狮子说明理事关系：狮子相并非自存实体，却也不是不存在；它依缘显现，而金体与多样相用不相妨碍。
claims.explanation_en: Fazang uses gold and lion to explain the relation of principle and phenomena: the lion-form is neither self-subsistent nor nonexistent, but conditionally manifest, while the gold and its manifold forms do not obstruct one another.
claims.locator: T45, no. 1881, 卷1，〈明緣起第一〉、〈辨色空第二〉
claims.excerpt_text: 謂金無自性，隨工巧匠緣，遂有師子相起。起但是緣，故名緣起。
claims.attribution_note: 通行大藏经本题“唐崇福寺贤首法师法藏述”。命题取该书首两门的连续论证，不以晚出注释文字代替法藏正文。

claims.text_zh: 菩提自性本来清净，成佛不在向外取得一个新实体，而在当下识取并直接显发本心。
claims.text_en: The self-nature of awakening is originally pure; Buddhahood is not the acquisition of a new external entity but the immediate recognition and manifestation of one's own mind.
claims.explanation_zh: 这一命题把修行的轴心从外在对象和阶梯式获得转向见性；“本来清净”不等于经验心从无烦恼，而是说觉悟的可能性不由外缘新造。
claims.explanation_en: This thesis shifts practice from external objects and stepwise acquisition to seeing one's nature. “Originally pure” does not mean that empirical consciousness has no afflictions, but that the possibility of awakening is not newly produced from outside.
claims.locator: T48, no. 2008, 卷1〈行由第一〉，p. 349a（开示“菩提自性”段）
claims.excerpt_text: 善知識！菩提自性，本來清淨，但用此心，直了成佛。
claims.attribution_note: 所引为元代宗宝编定的通行《坛经》系统，远晚于惠能本人；可归入“惠能传统/《坛经》所塑造的惠能思想”，不能声称是有同时代记录保证的逐字原话。

claims.text_zh: 人可以顿悟自心本来清净、与佛无异，但烦恼习气仍须依所悟之心渐次修除；顿悟与渐修因此不是互相排斥的道路。
claims.text_en: One may suddenly awaken to the mind's original purity and its ultimate nondifference from Buddha, yet habitual afflictions must still be gradually removed through cultivation grounded in that awakening; sudden awakening and gradual cultivation are therefore complementary rather than exclusive.
claims.explanation_zh: 宗密区分对真心的顿时“解悟”和习气净尽的逐步“证悟”，以此会通禅宗的顿悟语言与持续修行。
claims.explanation_en: Zongmi distinguishes sudden understanding of the true mind from the gradual realization that exhausts habits, thereby reconciling Chan rhetoric of sudden awakening with sustained cultivation.
claims.locator: T48, no. 2015, p. 399b-c，卷1“若頓悟自心本來清淨”段
claims.excerpt_text: 若頓悟自心本來清淨，元無煩惱，無漏智性本自具足，此心即佛，畢竟無異；依此而修者，是最上乘禪。
claims.attribution_note: 《禅源诸诠集都序》为宗密现存著述。规范命题结合此段“顿悟本净”与该书明确的依悟起修框架，未把“顿悟”误写成无需后续修行。
